items.title: Validate whether compact release-control copy improves task success
items.hypothesis: Users will understand release status faster with compact feature flag and A/B variant summaries.

items.title: Collect 10 persona-based feedback records
items.hypothesis: Different technical and non-technical personas reveal different product risks.

items.title: Run weekly metrics report from A/B events
items.hypothesis: Automated reporting reduces manual experiment review overhead.

items.title: Decide Pivot or Persevere from 2-week results
items.hypothesis: Metric deltas are strong enough to justify persevere on compact dashboard controls.
